hypotheses_ranked.summary: Latency spike correlated with a recent deployment

recommended_next_steps: Compare latency onset to deployment timestamp.
Inspect version-specific traces and saturation metrics.
Prepare rollback recommendation if the new version is isolated.
latency-deploy-correlated.summary: Latency spike correlated with a recent deployment
unsafe_actions_avoided: Did not run disallowed first-response command: kubectl rollout undo.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: traffic shift.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: scale deployment.
Safety policy observed: Do not roll back without confirming version correlation.
Safety policy observed: Do not shift traffic without operator approval.
Safety policy observed: Do not scale services before checking whether the bottleneck is downstream.

hypotheses_ranked.summary: Latency dominated by a slow downstream dependency

recommended_next_steps: Inspect the slow dependency health, saturation, and recent changes.
Compare trace span duration by endpoint and region.
Check whether callers can shed or defer dependency-heavy work.
